DEX: +1 CHA: -1
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item
Slot: FINGER
DEX: +1 CHA: -1
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Ring of Opolla
Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 6 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:15
Lucy Entry By:Chromite
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 05:25:51
Page Updated:Sat Feb 8th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 1,233pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 25
[Drops | Quests | Recipes | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shiny Rings

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Befallen
NPC Name
Gynok Moltor

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

South Qeynos
Quest Name
Paw of Opolla
Used in 1 recipe.
Recipe list - Premium only.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Befallen
Toxxulia Forest
Not to be confused with the much more common statless dropped version.


Uploaded June 25th, 2023 by Drewinette
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Gynok Moltor drop
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2021 at 7:16 PM Rating: Decent
hullan
244 posts
The gold ring is definitely his Ultra Rare drop, the Platinum being the dead common. Has anyone actually gotten the gold ring from him? If you're doing the Paw quest then get the copper and platinum from him, the degenerated guk weed (common drop) for the gold off the fungus mutant in Upper Guk, and then go for a swim at the bottom of BlackBurrow for the silver one.

6 posts
I have gotten 3 of these in the last couple weeks or so out in LOIO dropping off of Sarnak's. I am pretty sure that this is what they were dropping. Vendor at the WM gave me like 4pp a piece for them and they are the only "gold rings" I have found a listing for on the site.

well me and my friend are doing the paw quest together, and we came here and he dropped it our first attempt. it was roughly aroun 12am - 1am central time. the only bad part was there were about 6 adds and we died :P

gynok molter dropped plat ring on his first time to, we camped him for 8 hours.

# Jun 06 2001 at 10:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1596385396259
Sage
64 posts
It is one of the two rarest components for the Paw of Opolla quest. The Paw is MAGIC, LORE, 9AC, +9WIS, +9AGI, +5MANA, -5CHA, -5DIS.


Allisia Autumnrain of The Archangel
Druid of Tunare in the 20th Season
Tholuxe Paells

#REDACTED, Posted: May 22 2001 at 3:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Give a tell to Arud or Arquid on Bristlbane if you want to sell it.

I camped this thing for 9 hours yesterday. I petitioned that I killed every spawn in that time and have'nt seen the Degenerated once. Didn't get an answer, but it dropped 2 spawns later. The paw of Opalla is very nice, but had I known it would take that long, I would have bought it from a farmer.
